title: matelea correllii
intro: Matelea correllii, also known as Coral Milk Vine or Coral Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Matelea correllii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating skin conditions, as well as providing relief for respiratory issues and digestive problems. Matelea correllii can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully researched and consulted with a healthcare professional before application.
